title: Eva at the surf line — note to Papa
prompt: Mid-shot at the gentle calm surf line of @beach-shore. @Papa already CENTER-LEFT standing ankle-deep in the gentle calm surf with both feet planted firmly on the sandy seabed, hands relaxed at his sides, gently looking out at the horizon. Papa has exactly two arms and two hands visible. @Eva already standing on the dry sand on the RIGHT a few feet from Papa with both feet planted on the sand, holding the unrolled @rescue-note up over her head with both hands like a happy victory flag. Curly blonde hair with rainbow bow. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands visible. (BEAT 1 — 0-5s) Eva (cheerful warm joyful sing-song call, big smile, NOT scary, NOT angry): "Daddy! Daddy LOOK! Ginger needs us!" Papa turns gently with a surprised warm dad-smile, knee-deep in the calm surf. (BEAT 2 — 5-10s) Papa (warm curious dad-tone): "Ginger needs us? Show me, little explorer." Papa gently lifts both hands toward Eva in a 'come here let me see' gesture, still standing in the calm gentle surf with both feet on the sandy seabed. Eva keeps the note held up softly with both hands. The water around Papa's legs stays calm and gentle. Preserve each character's silhouette and proportions throughout — no morphing of facial features, no shifting of hair or wardrobe, no color drift on clothing or skin tone. Keep all character bodies stable, consistent in scale, and locked to the same outfit and hairstyle from second 0 through the final second. STRICT ANATOMY: Papa has exactly two arms and two hands at all times. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands at all times, both holding the note up. Papa stays grounded in the gentle calm surf with both feet on the sandy seabed throughout. Eva stays grounded with both feet on the dry sand throughout. The sand and water stay plain clean — no marks, no red, no debris.
